problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
